mapper.select:
WITH FilteredData AS ( SELECT
/* @SQLID=SUB020301_03-02#Sql001 */
/* @SQLID=SUB020301_03-03#Sql001 */
COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTAL_ROW, KKBH.BOND_CODE AS SBM_BOND_CODE, KKBH.BROKER_CODE, MB2.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE AS BROKERAGE_BRANCH_CODE, KKBH.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE, KKBH.BUTEN_CODE, KKBH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, MUAI.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE, MUAI.NAME_KANJI AS CUSTOMER_NAME_KANJI, MUAI.NAME_KANA AS CUSTOMER_NAME_KANA, MUAI.DEALER_NUMBER, MB1.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_NAME, MB2.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_BRANCH_NAME, MB2.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, KKBH.BRAND_NAME, KKBH.QUANTITY AS HOLDING_QUANTITY, SBPI.SBPI_PDF_URL AS PDF_NOTICE_URL, LISTAGG(NVL(A1.SBJM_BRAND_NAME, ' '), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.SBJM_BRAND_NAME ASC) AS JUDGMENT_BRAND_NAME, LISTAGG(NVL(A1.SBJM_CURRENT_PRICE, -1), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.SBJM_BRAND_NAME ASC) AS PRICE,
LISTAGG(NVL(A1.SBJM_NOCKIN_PRICE, -1), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.SBJM_BRAND_NAME ASC) AS KNOCK_IN_LEVEL_PRICE, LISTAGG(NVL(A1.SBJD_NOCKIN_ONSET_DATE, ' '), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.SBJM_BRAND_NAME ASC) AS KNOCKIN_DATE
LISTAGG(NVL(A1.SBJM_EARLY_PAYMENT_PRICE, -1), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.SBJM_BRAND_NAME ASC) AS EARLY_REDEMPTION_LEVEL_PRICE, LISTAGG(NVL(A1.SBJD_EARLY_PAYMENT_JUDGE_DATE, ' '), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.SBJM_BRAND_NAME ASC) AS EARLY_REDEMPTION_DETERMINATION_DATE
FROM KNOCKIN_KNOCKOUT_BRAND_HOLD KKBH INNER JOIN (
SELECT SBJM.SBJM_BOND_CODE, SBJM.SBJM_BRAND_NAME, SBJM.SBJM_CURRENT_PRICE,
SBJM.SBJM_NOCKIN_PRICE, A2.SBJD_NOCKIN_ONSET_DATE
SBJM_EARLY_PAYMENT_PRICE, A2.SBJD_EARLY_PAYMENT_JUDGE_DATE
FROM STRUCTURED_BOND_JUDGE_MST SBJM LEFT JOIN (
SELECT SBJRD.SBJD_BOND_CODE, SBJRD.SBJD_GROUP_CODE, SBJRD.SBJD_EXCHANGE_CODE, SBJRD.SBJD_TICKER_CODE,
SBJRD.SBJD_NOCKIN_ONSET_DATE
SBJRD.SBJD_EARLY_PAYMENT_JUDGE_DATE
FROM STRUCTURED_BOND_JUG_RSL_DTL SBJRD INNER JOIN (
SELECT MAX(SBJD_JUDGEMENT_DATE) AS LATEST_SBJD_JUDGEMENT_DATE, SBJD_BOND_CODE, SBJD_EVENT_KBN, SBJD_GROUP_CODE, SBJD_EXCHANGE_CODE, SBJD_TICKER_CODE FROM STRUCTURED_BOND_JUG_RSL_DTL WHERE
SBJD_EVENT_KBN = '10'
SBJD_EVENT_KBN = '20'
GROUP BY SBJD_BOND_CODE, SBJD_EVENT_KBN, SBJD_GROUP_CODE, SBJD_EXCHANGE_CODE, SBJD_TICKER_CODE ) A3 ON SBJRD.SBJD_JUDGEMENT_DATE = A3.LATEST_SBJD_JUDGEMENT_DATE AND SBJRD.SBJD_BOND_CODE = A3.SBJD_BOND_CODE AND SBJRD.SBJD_EVENT_KBN = A3.SBJD_EVENT_KBN AND SBJRD.SBJD_GROUP_CODE = A3.SBJD_GROUP_CODE AND SBJRD.SBJD_EXCHANGE_CODE = A3.SBJD_EXCHANGE_CODE AND SBJRD.SBJD_TICKER_CODE = A3.SBJD_TICKER_CODE ) A2 ON SBJM.SBJM_BOND_CODE = A2.SBJD_BOND_CODE AND SBJM.SBJM_GROUP_CODE = A2.SBJD_GROUP_CODE AND SBJM.SBJM_EXCHANGE_CODE = A2.SBJD_EXCHANGE_CODE AND SBJM.SBJM_TICKER_CODE = A2.SBJD_TICKER_CODE ) A1 ON KKBH.BOND_CODE = A1.SBJM_BOND_CODE INNER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI ON KKBH.BUTEN_CODE = MUAI.BUTEN_CODE AND KKBH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND KKBH.BROKER_CODE = MUAI.BROKER_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SBIR.SBIR_BOND_CODE,
SBIR.SBIR_KNOCKIN_PDF_ID
SBIR.SBIR_EARLY_PDF_ID
FROM STRUCTURED_BOND_IFA_REF SBIR INNER JOIN (
SELECT SBIR_BOND_CODE FROM STRUCTURED_BOND_IFA_REF GROUP BY SBIR_BOND_CODE HAVING COUNT(SBIR_BOND_CODE) = 1
) B2 ON SBIR.SBIR_BOND_CODE = B2.SBIR_BOND_CODE ) B1 ON KKBH.BOND_CODE = B1.SBIR_BOND_CODE LEFT JOIN STRUCTURED_BOND_PDF_INF SBPI ON
B1.SBIR_KNOCKIN_PDF_ID = SBPI.SBPI_PDF_ID
B1.SBIR_EARLY_PDF_ID = SBPI.SBPI_PDF_ID
LEFT JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH MB1 ON KKBH.BROKER_CODE = MB1.BROKER_CODE AND MB1.BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' AND MB1.DELETE_FLG = '0' LEFT JOIN V_MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO MB2 ON KKBH.BROKER_CODE = MB2.BROKER_CODE AND KKBH.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE = MB2.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE
KKBH.EVENT_KBN = '10'
KKBH.EVENT_KBN = '20'
AND (KKBH.BROKER_CODE IN
) OR KKBH.BROKER_CODE IN(
,
#{brokerCharge.brokerCode}
)
AND ((KKBH.BROKER_CODE, KKBH.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE) IN
) OR (KKBH.BROKER_CODE, KKBH.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE) IN(
,
(#{brokerCharge.brokerCode}, #{brokerCharge.empCode})
)
AND KKBH.BROKER_CODE IN
#{brokerCode}
AND KKBH.BROKER_CODE NOT IN
#{brokerCode}
AND MB2.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = #{req.branchCode}
AND KKBH.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE = #{req.empCode}
AND KKBH.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode}
AND KKBH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
AND (MUAI.NAME_KANJI = #{req.customerNameKanjiKana} OR MUAI.NAME_KANA = #{req.customerNameKanjiKana})
AND (MUAI.NAME_KANJI LIKE #{req.customerNameKanjiKana} || '%' OR MUAI.NAME_KANA LIKE #{req.customerNameKanjiKana} || '%')
AND (MUAI.NAME_KANJI LIKE '%' || #{req.customerNameKanjiKana} || '%' OR MUAI.NAME_KANA LIKE '%' || #{req.customerNameKanjiKana} || '%')
AND MUAI.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE IN
#{course.id}
GROUP BY KKBH.BOND_CODE, KKBH.BROKER_CODE, MB2.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE, KKBH.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE, KKBH.BUTEN_CODE, KKBH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, MUAI.CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE, MUAI.NAME_KANJI, MUAI.NAME_KANA, MUAI.DEALER_NUMBER, MB1.BRANCH_NAME, MB2.BRANCH_NAME, MB2.BROKER_CHARGE_NAME, KKBH.BRAND_NAME, KKBH.QUANTITY, SBPI.SBPI_PDF_URL ORDER BY KKBH.BROKER_CODE ASC, KKBH.BUTEN_CODE ASC, KKBH.ACCOUNT_NUMBER ASC, KKBH.BOND_CODE ASC ) SELECT * FROM FilteredData FETCH FIRST #{req.maxRow} ROWS ONLY
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020301_03-02/03#Sql002 */ FILE_DIR AS FILE_DIRECTORY FROM TB_MED_TEMP_FILE_DIR WHERE FUNC_ID = #{req.functionId} AND CAT_ID = #{req.t9nInfoCat}
